Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Ha! I've been offered millions for my share of the company. And none managed to tempt me.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: But when some no-name human offers to give me nothing in return except... except phrasing it as if it'd somehow be for my benefit -- well, how could I say no?

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I do commend you on that attitude, sprout. You wouldn't believe how far you can get in life by annoying everyone into obeying your whims.

Line.Text: Just be reasonable about it. I have a choice to retire with or without you in the mix.

Choices.Text: If you have enough to retire, why don't you do it? It doesn't sound like you love your job.
I think that something got lost in translation. I was dead serious.
